name: Florida Bright Futures Scholarship
sponsor: Florida Department of Education / Office of Student Financial Assistance
amount: Florida Academic Scholars: full tuition + $300/semester at FL public university; Florida Medallion: 75% of tuition

eligibility.citizenship: U.S. citizen or eligible non-citizen; FL resident
eligibility.other_requirements: FL resident; graduate from FL high school; minimum GPA and test score requirements (Academic: 3.5 + 29 ACT/1330 SAT; Medallion: 3.0 + 25 ACT/1210 SAT); minimum community service hours

stackable_notes: State scholarship; stacks with institutional merit awards. No displacement at public FL institutions. Private colleges may have different policies.
notes: Two tiers: Florida Academic Scholars (more generous) and Medallion Scholars. Community service hours required (100 hours for Academic, 75 for Medallion). GPA is weighted for eligibility. Test score requirements may change — verify annually.
